title: Seam Agency v0 matched Build pair qualification
context: Bench-owned public development tasks. Oracle execution qualifies references only and is not agent performance evidence.
inputs: Two clean-room Harbor microrepositories: one AI-required mixed-seam Build task and one pure deterministic Build control.
outputs: Harbor verifier rewards for reference qualification; agent attempts require a separately declared real agent configuration.
decision: Qualify the matched Build task shape before any cross-harness Seam Agency experiment.
